series_metadata.series_description: This file is a record of the measures taken to prove/disprove an employees misconduct which may lead to discipline or any non-compliance by management of a bargaining contract. It must include the original grievance form (including the postmarked mailing envelope), the discipline notification letter and any documentation in support of the discipline or non-compliance. It will also include documentation from all of the grievance steps including documentation submitted by the grievant or union to refute the claim.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Record is scanned into Employee and Labor Relations database and retained until employee separates from BWC or is no longer of administrative value. ; Paper: Retain in Personnel file according to collective bargaining agreement requirements, then destroy by shredding., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
